_comment: This file's header is shaped for a 31-day month (7 worker columns + d01..d31, e.g. January) -- deliberately wrong when parsed against a 28-day month. workforceCsvHeader() derives the expected header from the month argument passed to parseWorkforceCsv, so calling it with month='2027-02' (28 days) against this 38-column header is a length/shape mismatch -- WorkforceCsvHeaderError, a file-level error thrown before any per-row processing.
call: parseWorkforceCsv(csvText, '2027-02') -- throws; header shape is for a 31-day month, not 2027-02's 28

fileError.messageContains: header for month 2027-02 must be exactly
